legal_notice.title: Sovereign Trace Protocol — Audit Completion Filing
content: This form permanently seals a completed AI output audit to the ledger.
All fields are public. The record is immutable after submission.
**Verified auditors:** Enter your STP Auditor badge number below.
Your LinkedIn and name will be matched against the verified registry.
The record is permanent. The warning is permanent.

fields.label: STP Auditor Badge Number
fields.description: Format: STP-AUDITOR-XXXX. Leave blank if filing as unverified.

fields.label: Auditor LinkedIn Profile URL
fields.description: Must match the LinkedIn on file for your badge number.

fields.label: Sheldon K. Salmon Personal Certification Badge
fields.description: Only select YES if Sheldon personally reviewed and certified this audit.
options: Yes — Sheldon K. Salmon Personally Certified

fields.label: Findings Summary
fields.description: High-level summary of audit findings. This is the permanent public record.
fields.placeholder: 10 outputs reviewed. 3 hallucination events identified. 2 confidence miscalibrations. 1 scope violation. Remediation plan attached. Organization cleared for Tier 1 certification.

fields.label: Remediation Status
fields.description: What was recommended. What was implemented. What remains open.
fields.placeholder: Hallucination events: prompt engineering fix deployed. Confidence miscalibrations: model swap recommended, pending.

fields.label: Audit Report Upload
fields.description: Upload the full audit report as PDF or ZIP. This is sealed to the ledger.

fields.label: Auditor Declaration
options: I certify that this audit was conducted by me personally and the findings reported here are accurate and complete.
I understand this record is permanent, immutable, and publicly visible in the Sovereign Trace ledger.
I understand that filing under a badge number I do not hold is fraud and will be permanently recorded as such.

steps: Badge verification — Checked against verified auditor registry.
Sealing — Sealed with a FROZEN-2.0 triple-time cryptographic stamp. Permanent.
Ledger entry — Enters the Sovereign Trace ledger with auditor name, timestamp, and SHA-256 hash.
Notification — You receive your ledger entry ID and SHA-256 hash.
after_submit.footer:
The seal is the certification. The ledger is the track record.

Sovereign Trace Protocol | Sheldon K. Salmon | aionsystem2026@gmail.com
